title: Viola vectensis
taxonomy: Viola vectensis belongs to the family Violaceae. This plant is a species of viola, which is a type of flowering plant. The genus Viola is a part of the order Malpighiales, which is a large order of flowering plants. The family Violaceae is within the order Malpighiales, and the order Malpighiales is within the clade Rosids. The clade Rosids is a subgroup within the larger clade of eudicots.
